tasks.description: Daily 2am PT poker intel briefing for The Only Friends Podcast, posted to Discord #intel-staging
Daily 3am PT world news & trends briefing for The Only Friends Podcast, posted to Discord #intel-staging
Daily 4am PT memes & culture drop for The Only Friends Podcast, posted to Discord #intel-staging
Daily 7am PT run-of-show for The Only Friends Podcast. Posts a condensed single-page brief to #run-of-show and the full detailed ROS to #intel-staging.

Daily 8am PT thumbnail generator for The Only Friends Podcast — reads ROS from #run-of-show, produces A/B for biggest story + alternative for 2nd biggest, judge enforces ≥70 with rebuilds, posts 3 images to #thumbnails.

Daily 8:15am PT producer audit before 8:30 pre-production for The Only Friends Podcast. Audits #intel-staging / ROS / thumbnails, promotes assets + design requests out of #intel-staging, and acts on Matt's manual notes in #producer.
Primary 7:30am PT show-graphics sweep for The Only Friends Podcast — reads #graphic-design requests, generates tone-driven 1280×720 graphics via Nano Banana Pro, posts to #assets
Late 8:05am PT show-graphics sweep for The Only Friends Podcast — catches late adds and any graphics flagged by thumbnails, finishes before 8:15 producer audit
Daily 5am PT viral-hand research cron for The Only Friends Podcast. Summary of ranked hands → #intel-staging; clip link → #assets. Feeds the B block.
Writes /Users/mjb11/Documents/Claude/Projects/Media Company Infrastructure/web/data.json every 5 minutes AND pushes the change to GitHub so the Mission Control Pages site serves fresh data.
tasks.schedule: Every 5 minutes, every hour, every day

ros.content: 📋 **Run of Show — Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — EP. —** A BLOCK: Matusow Says High-Roller Earnings Are a Mirage — Chidwick Admits $5–10M on $76M Lifetime. B BLOCK: WSOP Rings Debut in Texas Tomorrow (While The Lodge Sits Frozen) | USPO Championship Tonight. C BLOCK: Zobian's USPO #9 + Children's Nonprofit / Hellmuth Home Game Ep 20 "Quads" Moment / Wemby Concussion / Cartillier's Cinderella WSOPC Win.
🎯 COLD OPEN (~2 min) Lead with the number, then the math, then the question. Suggested line: "Chidwick has $76M in career tournament cashes. How much did he actually keep? $5-10M."

🔴 A BLOCK (~40 min) — Matusow Calls High-Roller Earnings a Mirage. Then the Pros Told Us What They Actually Keep. Davies ~50% own action typical. Chidwick $5-10M on $76M. Deeb: Peters problems aren't poker losses.
A BLOCK — Talking Points. Matusow is right, but real number is worse. Hendon Mob lie. Davies' 50% number. What Deeb is hinting at. Does this kill high-roller content or grow it?

A BLOCK — Counterpoint + Tangents + Seed Line. Matt's seed: 'Mike Matusow said it ugly. Stephen Chidwick put the real number on the board. From here on out — when somebody says they won $8M on the PGT, the honest follow-up is: okay, what did you keep?'

🟠 B BLOCK (~30 min) — WSOP Rings Cross the Texas Border (While The Lodge Is Frozen) + USPO Finale Tonight. First-ever WSOP Circuit in Texas opens Apr 23–May 4 at TCH Austin. $600 Mini Main, $500K GTD.
B BLOCK — Segment 2: USPO Championship Event #10 Tonight. $25.6K Championship. Wilson is USPO points leader; 7 different winners through 9 events. Hand of the Day: 5th consecutive no-find.
😂 C BLOCK (~15 min) — Light, Clip-Ready, + Wemby for the Degens. Item 1: Aram Zobian Wins USPO #9 ($292,800) — runs Natna Children's Foundation. Item 2: Hellmuth Home Game Ep 20 quads moment.
C BLOCK Items 3 & 4. Item 3: Wemby face-plants Game 2, concussion protocol, Spurs lose 106-103. Item 4 (cut first): Cartillier wins WSOPC Aix-en-Provence €150K on 3rd career cash.
🔚 CLOSE (~3 min). Tease tomorrow: USPO Championship result + WSOPC Texas opening night. NFL Draft opens in Pittsburgh tomorrow night. Tesla earnings tonight.
🚩 ALL PREP FLAGS. Conrad: Matusow/Chidwick side-by-side graphic. WSOPC Texas schedule. Lodge vs TCH Austin split. Wemby fall clip. Andy: Wilson PGT title pace vs Soverel. USPO #10 entries/start.

⚠️ Producer audit blocked from #producer — rerouted here. Main DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN is still 401; GEORGE_BOT_TOKEN fallback also returns 401; Claude_Bridge has no send permission in #producer. Action: rotate DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.
🎬 Producer Audit — April 22, 2026. ROS posted 7:25a PT. Thumbnails 3/3 cleared judge ≥70: A 74, B 75, C 72. 8/8 show graphics shipped. Every A/B/C segment has staged asset + matching graphic.

⚠️ Flags: 1) Iran/Hormuz lead has zero ROS placement. 2) B Block TP1 'Texas AG' partisan-adjacent — swap to 'Texas enforcement'. 3) Thumbs A+B concept-only (Claid billing exhausted). 4) Clips not visibly confirmed in #assets.
🔥 Breaking (last 2 hrs): None. Swept PokerNews, WSOP.com, CardPlayer, Google News. Recommend: Lock Iran/Hormuz in or out. Softening on B block TP1. Confirm Conrad's 3 clips.
